claims.notes: Open-source Python CLI tool generating tailored AI Agent Bill of Rights documents in Markdown and PDF, grounded in IEEE EAD, EU AI Act, and Asilomar frameworks. Includes 10-rights catalogue, profile-driven selection, 3 example profiles, and 3 sample outputs.

claude.reasoning: The submission provides a public GitHub repository with a working Python CLI tool that generates tailored AI Agent Bill of Rights documents, meeting the core deliverable. It references the three required AI ethics frameworks (IEEE Ethically Aligned Design, EU AI Act, and Asilomar AI Principles), includes a 10-rights catalogue with profile-driven selection, and provides three sample generated outputs demonstrating varied agent profiles in both Markdown and PDF formats. The repository includes a README with installation, usage, and example documentation as specified in the bounty requirements.
